title: crepis willdenowii subsp. willdenowii
intro: Crepis willdenowii subsp. willdenowii, also known as Willdenow's hawk's beard or creeping hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Crepis willdenowii subsp. willdenowii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots can be used fresh or dried in herbal preparations.
